Label: DisclosureOfNotesInCaseOfPublicShareholdingIsLessThan25PercentageExplanatoryTextBlock
Value: <div>  <p>We are pleased to inform you that the company has successfully achieved the required minimum public shareholding by issuing 3'|31'|375 rights shares to non-promoter shareholders. This step has been taken in accordance with the prescribed modes outlined in Chapter VI'| Section VI-A of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11'| 2024.</p>  <p>Our Shareholding pattern post right issue allotment on February 04'| 2025'| is as follows:</p>  <p>Promoters - 11'|39'|750 - 74.43%.</p>  <p>Public - 3'|91'|375 - 25.56%</p>  <div></div></div>
Description: Disclosure of notes in case of public share holding is less than 25 percentage
